hindiTranslation: इन्द्रियोंके विषयोंमें वैराग्यका होना, अहंकारका भी न होना और जन्म, मृत्यु, वृद्धावस्था तथा व्याधियोंमें दुःखरूप दोषोंको बारबार देखना ॥
englishTranslation: Dispassion toward sense objects, absence of ego, and constant seeing of the fault in birth, death, old age, and disease.
essence: Freedom begins when desire stops dressing suffering as reward.
speaker: Krishna
